page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8ae.4xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores utilizing the x86_64 AMD EPYC 9T34 processor, operating at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz. The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the AMD EPYC processor delivers top-tier single-core performance, as evidenced by its stress-ng single-core CPU score and strong Geekbench single-core results. Text processing capabilities are particularly notable, ranking in the top 10% of tested systems. Multi-core performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations align with average mid-tier expectations. The CPU architecture supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 vector extensions, AVX512_VNNI, AVX512_BF16, and hardware-accelerated cryptography via AES and SHA-NI.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.r8ae.4xlarge offers a dense memory profile relative to its compute allocation, making it a viable option for memory-bound workloads without the overhead of excess CPU cores. The lack of bundled local storage requires external block storage configuration, which represents a key architectural tradeoff. This instance is well-suited for memory-intensive applications, including database hosting, caching layers such as Redis, text processing pipelines, and enterprise applications requiring substantial memory capacity.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8ae.4xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 16 dedicated physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 9T34 processor running at 3.4 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it provides 128.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high 8.0 GB per core memory-to-vCPU ratio. The instance lacks local storage and GPU hardware, but delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps. Benchmark data highlights top-tier single-core CPU performance and exceptional text processing capabilities, while multi-core operations and memory bandwidth remain in the average tier. The processor supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and hardware-accelerated cryptography. This configuration offers high memory density relative to compute resources, making it a cost-effective choice for memory-bound workloads. It is highly suitable for database hosting, Redis caching layers, text processing, and general-purpose enterprise applications requiring significant memory capacity.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8ae.4xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 16 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 128 GB RAM, and 12 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering top-tier single-core and text processing performance.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and high memory density for database and caching workloads.

128.0 GB of RAM providing a high 8.0 GB per core ratio
Top-tier single-core CPU and text processing benchmark performance
Supports AVX-512, AVX512_VNNI, and hardware-accelerated cryptography
